subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-09-14
subcodes.first_line: If the Blessed Perfection had not exerted Himself to raise up the Cause of God, the Cause of the Primal Point would have been completely effaced... All the affairs and conditions of the world serve the Cause of God... With this type of sacrifice they attained success. But remember
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر جمال مبارک قیام و امرالله را بلند نمی فرمودند امر حضرت نقطهٴ اولی بکلی محو شده بود
subcodes.subjects: @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis
